if (!Array.isArray(args[0])) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] SET_WANTED_POSTER_DATA: 無效的資料參數', args[0]);\\n            return false;\\n        }\\n        return true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 事件回調\\n     * @param event 事件名稱\\n     * @param args 事件參數\\n     */\\n    OnEvent(event: string, ...args: any[]) {\\n        switch (event) {\\n            case WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.SET_WANTED_POSTER_DATA:\\n                if (this.ValidateSetWantedPosterDataArgs(args)) {\\n                    this.SetWantedPosterData(\\n                        args[0] as IBountyData[],\\n                        args[1] === true,\\n                        Array.isArray(args[2]) ? args[2] as number[] : undefined\\n                    );\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.SET_WANTED_POSTER_UI_SHOW:\\n                if (this.ValidateSetWantedPosterUIShowArgs(args)) {\\n                    this.SetWantedPosterUIShow(args[0] as boolean);\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.PLAY_MARK:\\n                this.HandlePlayMark(args[0] as number, args[1] as () => void);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE:\\n                this.HandlePlayMarkActive(args[0] as number, args[1] as () => void);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.GAME_INTRO_COMPLETE:\\n                this.HandleGameIntroComplete();\\n                break;\\n\\n            case GAME_EVENT.DEVICE_ROTATION:\\n                this.ApplyLayoutByOrientation();\\n                break;\\n\\n            default:\\n                warn('[WantedPosterManager] OnEvent: 未知的事件', event);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依目前裝置方向套用對應的 Layout 設定\\n     * 由 start() 與 GAME_EVENT.DEVICE_ROTATION 事件觸發\\n     */\\n    private ApplyLayoutByOrientation(): void {\\n        if (!this.m_layout) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] ApplyLayoutByOrientation: m_layout 未設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const isLandscape = Common.GetGameView().IsLandscape;\\n        const cfg = isLandscape ? this.m_landscapeConfig : this.m_portraitConfig;\\n\\n        this.m_layout.type = cfg.type;\\n        this.m_layout.resizeMode = this.m_layout.paddingBottom = cfg.paddingBottom;\\n        this.m_layout.spacingX = cfg.spacingX;\\n        this.m_layout.spacingY = cfg.spacingY;\\n        this.m_layout.alignHorizontal = resolve callback 缺失');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const items = this.GetItemsByBaseSymbol(baseSymbol);\\n        if (items.length === 0) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] PLAY_MARK: 找不到對應 item, baseSymbol=', baseSymbol);\\n            resolve();\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        Promise.all(items.map(item => item.PlayMark())).then(() => resolve());\\n callback 缺失 → error\\n     */\\n    private HandlePlayMarkActive(baseSymbol: number, resolve: () => void) {\\n        if (typeof resolve !== 'function') {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE: resolve callback 缺失');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const items = this.GetItemsByBaseSymbol(baseSymbol);\\n        if (items.length === 0) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE: 找不到對應 item, baseSymbol=', baseSymbol);\\n            resolve();\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        Promise.all(items.map(item =>\\n            item.PlayMarkActive().then(() => {\\n                item.node.active = false;\\n                // 收尾關閉 item → 同步清除綁定，避免與 m_currentBounty 失同步\\n                const idx = this.m_wantedPosterItems.indexOf(item);\\n                if (idx >= 0) this.m_currentBounty[idx] = null;\\n            })\\n        )).then(() => resolve());\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理 GAME_INTRO_COMPLETE 事件\\n     * 遊戲介紹完成後顯示 1 個懸賞令（M1、倍率 9999）\\n     * 複用 SetWantedPosterData 顯示路徑：isNewRound=true 走 BC-20 整批重建（SetData + active + PlayIn），\\n     * Multiple=9999 ≥ Multiplier_Max → item 內部走 m_x9999Node 顯示分支\\n     */\\n    private HandleGameIntroComplete() {\\n        // 介紹完成屬「全新展示」→ isNewRound=true，整批重建\\n        this.SetWantedPosterData([\\n            { BaseSymbol: Symbol.M1, content.thinking:
The user edited a comment in HandleGameIntroComplete to change the BC case reference from BC-1 to BC-20. However, this seems incorrect - BC-20 doesn't exist in the specification. The actual BC cases are BC-1 through BC-6. BC-1 specifically refers to "isNewRound=true (new round) → exit all existing, enter all new (full rebuild)".

This appears to be a typo or error. The correct reference should be BC-1, not BC-20. I should record this as it's a documentation error that may cause confusion.

  }\\n\\n    /**@ch 取消註冊事件*/\\n    private UnregisterEvent() {\\n        WantedPosterManager.EVENTS_TO_REGISTER.forEach(eventName => {\\n            eventManager.UnRegister(eventName, this);\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 驗證 SET_WANTED_POSTER_UI_SHOW 事件參數\\n     * @param args 事件參數\\n     * @returns 是否有效\\n     */\\n    private ValidateSetWantedPosterUIShowArgs(args: any[]): boolean    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 驗證 SET_WANTED_POSTER_DATA 事件參數\\n     * @param args 事件參數\\n     * @returns 是否有效\\n     */\\n    private ValidateSetWantedPosterDataArgs(args: any[]): boolean {\\n this.m_layout.paddingBottom = cfg.paddingBottom;\\n        this.m_layout.spacingX = cfg.spacingX;\\n        this.m_layout.spacingY = cfg.spacingY;\\n        this.m_layout.alignHorizontal = cfg.alignHorizontal;\\n        this.m_layout.alignVertical = cfg.alignVertical;\\n        this.m_layout.updateLayout();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理 PLAY_MARK 事件\\n     * BC-4：對該 BaseSymbol 的所有相符常駐 item 同時播 Mark，全部完成才 resolve\\n     *       （找到 N 個就播 N 個；N=0 才視為 EH-1，0<N 屬可接受降級不 warn）\\n     * EH-1：找不到任何對應 item（空陣列）→ warn + 立刻 resolve（不阻斷上游流程）\\n     * EH-9：resolve callback 缺失 → PLAY_MARK: 找不到對應 item, baseSymbol=', baseSymbol);\\n            resolve();\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        Promise.all(items.map(item => item.PlayMark())).then(() => resolve());\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理 PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE 事件\\n     * BC-6：對該 BaseSymbol 的所有相符 item 同時播 Mark_Active 並各自 active=false\\n     * EH-1：找不到任何對應 item（空陣列）→ warn + 立刻 resolve\\n     * EH-9：resolve warn('[WantedPosterManager] PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE: 找不到對應 item, baseSymbol=', baseSymbol);\\n            resolve();\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        Promise.all(items.map(item =>\\n            item.PlayMarkActive().then(() => {\\n                item.node.active = false;\\n                // 收尾關閉 item → 同步清除綁定，避免與 m_currentBounty 失同步\\n                const idx = item 內部走 m_x9999Node 顯示分支\\n     */\\n    private HandleGameIntroComplete() {\\n        // 介紹完成屬「全新展示」→ isNewRound=true，整批重建\\n        this.SetWantedPosterData([\\n            { BaseSymbol: Symbol.M1, BountySymbol: 0, Multiple: 9999, MultipleIndex: 0 },\\n        ], true);\\n    }\\n    //#endregion Event Management\\n\\n    //#region Methods\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置懸賞令資料（以 BaseSymbol multiset 比對前後狀態 — 決定 進場 / 退場 / 退場再進場 / 持續）\\n     *\\n     * 比對規則（內容式，計數 multiset；每個 BaseSymbol 綁定一個 item，持續者保留原綁定）：\\n     * - BC-1  isNewRound=true（新一局）→ 現有全部退場、新清單全部進場（整批重建）\\n     * - BC-2  同局・新增     *\\n     * @param dataList 本輪懸賞令資料（Multiple>0 才顯示）\\n     * @param isNewRound 是否新一局（強制整批重建）；省略視為同局 cascade\\n     * @param visibleBaseSymbols 盤面(扣除被消除位置)目前可見的 BaseSymbol；僅 cascade 需傳，省略視為全可見\\n     */\\n    private SetWantedPosterData(dataList: IBountyData[], isNewRound: boolean = false, visibleBaseSymbols?: number[]) {\\n        if (!this.m_wantedPosterItems || this.m_wantedPosterItems.length === 0) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] SetWantedPosterData: 懸賞令物品未設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.EnsureCurrentBountySize();\\n\\n        const count = this.m_wantedPosterItems.length;\\n        // 本輪要顯示的 bounty（Multiple>0），超量截斷至 item 數量上限\\n        const newBounties = dataList.filter(d => d && d.Multiple > 0);\\n        if (newBounties.length > count) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] SetWantedPosterData: 資料數量超過物品數量',\\n                newBounties.length, '>', count);\\n            newBounties.length = count;\\n        }\\n\\n        if (isNewRound) {\\n            this.RebuildAll(newBounties);\\n        } else {\\n            this.ReconcileCascade(newBounties, visibleBaseSymbols);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch BC-1 整批重建（新一局）：現有全部 Out 並關閉，全部 Out 完成後新清單依序設資料、active、PlayIn。\\n     *     先 Out 再一起 In，避免新舊同時在場造成 Layout 重排跳動。\\n     *     綁定同步記錄為目標狀態（視覺在 Out 完成後才 In）。\\n     */\\n    private RebuildAll(newBounties: IBountyData[]) {\\n        const count = this.m_wantedPosterItems.length;\\n\\n        const outPromises: Promise<void>[] = [];\\n        for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {\\n            const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n            if (item && item.node.active) {\\n                outPromises.push(item.PlayOut().then(() => { item.node.active = false; }));\\n            }\\n            // 同步記錄目標綁定（前 newBounties.length 個為新資料，其餘清空）\\n            this.m_currentBounty[i] = i < newBounties.length ? newBounties[i] : null;\\n        }\\n\\n        const enterAll = () => {\\n            for (let i = 0; i < newBounties.length; i++) {\\n                const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n                if (!item) continue;\\n                item.SetWantedPosterData(newBounties[i]);\\n                item.node.active = true;\\n                item.PlayIn();\\n            }\\n        };\\n\\n        if (outPromises.length > 0) Promise.all(outPromises).then(enterAll);\\n        else enterAll();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 同局 cascade 對帳：以 BaseSymbol multiset 比對目前綁定 ↔ 新清單，保留持續者的 item 綁定。\\n     *     - 同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 同・盤面仍可見 → 持續（不動）         [BC-6]\\n     *     - 同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 變 或 盤面已無此符號 → 原 item 退場再進場 [BC-4/BC-5]\\n     *     - 多出的新 BaseSymbol → 進場（優先用原本就空的 item；不足才等退場者騰出版位）[BC-2]\\n     *     - 少掉的舊 BaseSymbol → 退場                                  [BC-3]\\n     * @param visibleBaseSymbols 盤面(扣除被消除位置)可見的 BaseSymbol；省略視為全可見\\n     */\\n    private ReconcileCascade(newBounties: IBountyData[], visibleBaseSymbols?: number[]) {\\n        const count = this.m_wantedPosterItems.length;\\n        const visible = visibleBaseSymbols ? new Set(visibleBaseSymbols) : null;\\n\\n        // 新清單依 BaseSymbol 分組成可消耗的 pool（multiset）\\n        const pool = new Map<number, IBountyData[]>();\\n        for (const b of newBounties) {\\n            const list = pool.get(b.BaseSymbol);\\n            if (list) list.push(b); else pool.set(b.BaseSymbol, [b]);\\n        }\\n\\n        const preFreeSlots: number[] = [];      // 更新前就空著的 item，供進場立即使用\\n        const vacatingSlots: number[] = [];     // 本輪退場騰出的 item，Out 完才可用\\n        const outPromises: Promise<void>[] = [];\\n        const deferredEnter: IBountyData[] = [];\\n\\n        // Pass A：逐一決定目前已綁定 item 的命運\\n        for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {\\n            const cur = this.m_currentBounty[i];\\n            const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n            if (cur === null) {\\n                if (item) preFreeSlots.push(i);\\n                continue;\\n            }\\n            const bs = cur.BaseSymbol;\\n            const list = pool.get(bs);\\n            if (list && list.length > 0) {\\n                const onBoard = visible ? visible.has(bs) : true;\\n                // 優先配對「相同 Multiple」以持續（不播動畫）；盤面不可見則一律退場再進場\\n                const sameIdx = onBoard ? list.findIndex(b => b.Multiple === cur.Multiple) : -1;\\n                if (sameIdx >= 0) {\\n                    list.splice(sameIdx, 1);                 // BC-6 持續：消耗一筆，item 不動\\n                } else {\\n                    const nb = list.shift()!;                // BC-4/BC-5 退場再進場\\n                    if (item) item.PlayOut().then(() => { item.SetWantedPosterData(nb); item.PlayIn(); });\\n                    this.m_currentBounty[i] = nb;\\n                }\\n                if (list.length === 0) pool.delete(bs);\\n            } else {\\n                // BC-3 新清單已無此 BaseSymbol → 退場\\n                if (item) outPromises.push(item.PlayOut().then(() => { item.node.active = false; }));\\n                this.m_currentBounty[i] = null;\\n                vacatingSlots.push(i);\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        // Pass B：pool 剩餘 = 需進場的新 BaseSymbol [BC-2]\\n        const remaining: IBountyData[] = [];\\n        for (const list of pool.values()) remaining.push(...list);\\n        for (const nb of remaining) {\\n            if (preFreeSlots.length > 0) {\\n                this.EnterAt(preFreeSlots.shift()!, nb);     // 有現成空位 → 立即進場\\n            } else {\\n                deferredEnter.push(nb);                      // 無現成空位 → 等退場者騰出\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        // 不足的進場等所有退場完成後，使用騰出的 item 版位\\n        if (deferredEnter.length > 0) {\\n            Promise.all(outPromises).then(() => {\\n                for (const nb of deferredEnter) {\\n                    const idx = vacatingSlots.shift();\\n                    if (idx === undefined) break;            // 理論上不會（已截斷至 count）\\n                    this.EnterAt(idx, nb);\\n                }\\n            });\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 在指定 item 版位進場：設資料、active、PlayIn 並記錄綁定*/\\n    private EnterAt(index: number, data: IBountyData) {\\n        const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[index];\\n        if (!item) return;\\n        item.SetWantedPosterData(data);\\n        item.node.active = true;\\n        item.PlayIn();\\n        this.m_currentBounty[index] = data;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 確保綁定追蹤陣列長度與 item 數一致（初次/變動時補 null、保留既有）*/\\n    private EnsureCurrentBountySize() {\\n        const count = this.m_wantedPosterItems.length;\\n        if (this.m_currentBounty.length === count) return;\\n        const next: (IBountyData | null)[] = new Array(count).fill(null);\\n        const keep = Math.min(this.m_currentBounty.length, count);\\n        for (let i = 0; i < keep; i++) next[i] = this.m_currentBounty[i];\\n        this.m_currentBounty = next;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依 BaseSymbol 取得**所有**相符的 active 常駐 item（內部用，PLAY_MARK / PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE 路徑）\\n     * 同一盤面允許多筆同 BaseSymbol bounty（各自設到不同 index 的 item），故回陣列而非單一\\n     */\\n    private GetItemsByBaseSymbol(baseSymbol: number): WantedPosterItem[] {\\n        if (baseSymbol === null || baseSymbol === undefined) return [];\\n        const result: WantedPosterItem[] = [];\\n        for (const item of this.m_wantedPosterItems) {\\n            if (item && item.node.active && item.GetBaseSymbol() === baseSymbol) {\\n                result.push(item);\\n            }\\n        }\\n        return result;\\n    }\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置懸賞令 UI 顯示狀態\\n     * @param isShow 是否顯示\\n     */\\n    private SetWantedPosterUIShow(isShow: boolean) {\\n        if (!this.m_rootNode) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] SetWantedPosterUIShow: 根節點未設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.m_rootNode.active = isShow;\\n    }\\n    //#endregion Methods\\n\\n   this.SetWantedPosterData([\\n                    { BaseSymbol: Symbol.M1, BountySymbol: 0, Multiple: 2, MultipleIndex: 0 },\\n                ], true);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_2:\\n                log('[WantedPosterManager] 測試：顯示 2 個懸賞令');\\n                this.SetWantedPosterData([\\n                    { BaseSymbol: Symbol.M4, BountySymbol: 0, Multiple: 256, MultipleIndex: 0 },\\n                    { BaseSymbol: Symbol.M8, BountySymbol: 0, Multiple: 9999, MultipleIndex: 1 },\\n                ], true);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_3:\\n                log('[WantedPosterManager] 測試：顯示 UI');\\n                this.SetWantedPosterUIShow(true);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_4:\\n                log('[WantedPosterManager] 測試：隱藏 UI');\\n                this.SetWantedPosterUIShow(false);\\n                break;\\n        }\\n    }\\n    //#endregion (IBountyData | null)[] = [];\\n    //#endregion Variables\\n\\n    //#region Lifecycle\\n    /**@ch 元件載入時調用*/\\n    onLoad() {\\n        this.RegisterEvent();\\n        this.RegisterKeyboardEvents();\\n        this.EnsureCurrentBountySize();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 元件啟動時調用（GameView 已就緒，套用初始方向 Layout）*/\\n    start() {\\n        this.ApplyLayoutByOrientation();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 元件銷毀時調用*/\\n    onDestroy() {\\n        if (!this.m_isInitialized) return;\\n        this.UnregisterEvent();\\n        this.UnregisterKeyboardEvents();\\n        this.m_isInitialized = false;\\n    }\\n    //#endregion Lifecycle\\n\\n    //#region Event Management\\n    /**@ch 註冊鍵盤事件（測試用）*/\\n    private RegisterKeyboardEvents(): void {\\n        if (!DEBUG) return;\\n        // input.on(Input.EventType.KEY_DOWN, this.CheckTestKeyCode, this);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 取消註冊鍵盤事件（測試用）*/\\n    private UnregisterKeyboardEvents(): void {\\n        if (!DEBUG) return;\\n        // input.off(Input.EventType.KEY_DOWN, this.CheckTestKeyCode, this);\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 註冊事件*/\\n    private RegisterEvent() {\\n        WantedPosterManager.EVENTS_TO_REGISTER.forEach(eventName => {\\n            eventManager.Register(eventName, this);\\n        });\\n        this.m_isInitialized = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 取消註冊事件*/\\n    private UnregisterEvent() {\\n        WantedPosterManager.EVENTS_TO_REGISTER.forEach(eventName => {\\n            eventManager.UnRegister(eventName, this);\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 驗證 SET_WANTED_POSTER_UI_SHOW 事件參數\\n     * @param args 事件參數\\n     * @returns 是否有效\\n     */\\n    private ValidateSetWantedPosterUIShowArgs(args: any[]): boolean {\\n        if (typeof args[0] !== 'boolean') {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] SET_WANTED_POSTER_UI_SHOW: 無效的參數', args[0]);\\n            return false;\\n        }\\n        return true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 驗證 SET_WANTED_POSTER_DATA 事件參數\\n     * @param args 事件參數\\n     * @returns 是否有效\\n     */\\n    private ValidateSetWantedPosterDataArgs(args: any[]): boolean {\\n        if (!Array.isArray(args[0])) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] SET_WANTED_POSTER_DATA: 無效的資料參數', args[0]);\\n            return false;\\n        }\\n        return true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 事件回調\\n     * @param event 事件名稱\\n     * @param args 事件參數\\n     */\\n    OnEvent(event: string, ...args: any[]) {\\n        switch (event) {\\n            case WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.SET_WANTED_POSTER_DATA:\\n                if (this.ValidateSetWantedPosterDataArgs(args)) {\\n                    this.SetWantedPosterData(\\n                        args[0] as IBountyData[],\\n                        args[1] === true,\\n                        Array.isArray(args[2]) ? args[2] as number[] : undefined\\n                    );\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.SET_WANTED_POSTER_UI_SHOW:\\n                if (this.ValidateSetWantedPosterUIShowArgs(args)) {\\n                    this.SetWantedPosterUIShow(args[0] as boolean);\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.PLAY_MARK:\\n                this.HandlePlayMark(args[0] as number, args[1] as () => void);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE:\\n                this.HandlePlayMarkActive(args[0] as number, args[1] as () => void);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.GAME_INTRO_COMPLETE:\\n                this.HandleGameIntroComplete();\\n                break;\\n\\n            case GAME_EVENT.DEVICE_ROTATION:\\n                this.ApplyLayoutByOrientation();\\n                break;\\n\\n            default:\\n                warn('[WantedPosterManager] OnEvent: 未知的事件', event);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依目前裝置方向套用對應的 Layout 設定\\n     * 由 start() 與 GAME_EVENT.DEVICE_ROTATION 事件觸發\\n     */\\n    private ApplyLayoutByOrientation(): void {\\n        if (!this.m_layout) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] ApplyLayoutByOrientation: m_layout 未設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const isLandscape = Common.GetGameView().IsLandscape;\\n        const cfg = isLandscape ? this.m_landscapeConfig : this.m_portraitConfig;\\n\\n        this.m_layout.type = cfg.type;\\n        this.m_layout.resizeMode = cfg.resizeMode;\\n        this.m_layout.paddingLeft = cfg.paddingLeft;\\n        this.m_layout.paddingRight = cfg.paddingRight;\\n        this.m_layout.paddingTop = cfg.paddingTop;\\n        this.m_layout.paddingBottom = cfg.paddingBottom;\\n        this.m_layout.spacingX = cfg.spacingX;\\n        this.m_layout.spacingY = cfg.spacingY;\\n        this.m_layout.alignHorizontal = cfg.alignHorizontal;\\n        this.m_layout.alignVertical = cfg.alignVertical;\\n        this.m_layout.updateLayout();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理 PLAY_MARK 事件\\n     * BC-4：對該 BaseSymbol 的所有相符常駐 item 同時播 Mark，全部完成才 resolve\\n     *       （找到 N 個就播 N 個；N=0 才視為 EH-1，0<N 屬可接受降級不 warn）\\n     * EH-1：找不到任何對應 item（空陣列）→ warn + 立刻 resolve（不阻斷上游流程）\\n     * EH-9：resolve callback 缺失 → error（caller bug）\\n     */\\n    private HandlePlayMark(baseSymbol: number, resolve: () => void) {\\n        if (typeof resolve !== 'function') {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] PLAY_MARK: resolve callback 缺失');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const items = this.GetItemsByBaseSymbol(baseSymbol);\\n        if (items.length === 0) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] PLAY_MARK: 找不到對應 item, baseSymbol=', baseSymbol);\\n            resolve();\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        Promise.all(items.map(item => item.PlayMark())).then(() => resolve());\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理 PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE 事件\\n     * BC-6：對該 BaseSymbol 的所有相符 item 同時播 Mark_Active 並各自 active=false\\n     * EH-1：找不到任何對應 item（空陣列）→ warn + 立刻 resolve\\n     * EH-9：resolve callback 缺失 → error\\n     */\\n    private HandlePlayMarkActive(baseSymbol: number, resolve: () => void) {\\n        if (typeof resolve !== 'function') {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE: resolve callback 缺失');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const items = this.GetItemsByBaseSymbol(baseSymbol);\\n        if (items.length === 0) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE: 找不到對應 item, baseSymbol=', baseSymbol);\\n            resolve();\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        Promise.all(items.map(item =>\\n            item.PlayMarkActive().then(() => {\\n                item.node.active = false;\\n                // 收尾關閉 item → 同步清除綁定，避免與 m_currentBounty 失同步\\n                const idx = this.m_wantedPosterItems.indexOf(item);\\n                if (idx >= 0) this.m_currentBounty[idx] = null;\\n            })\\n        )).then(() => resolve());\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理 GAME_INTRO_COMPLETE 事件\\n     * 遊戲介紹完成後顯示 1 個懸賞令（M1、倍率 9999）\\n     * 複用 SetWantedPosterData 顯示路徑：isNewRound=true 走 BC-20 整批重建（SetData + active + PlayIn），\\n     * Multiple=9999 ≥ Multiplier_Max → item 內部走 m_x9999Node 顯示分支\\n     */\\n    private HandleGameIntroComplete() {\\n        // 介紹完成屬「全新展示」→ isNewRound=true，整批重建\\n        this.SetWantedPosterData([\\n            { BaseSymbol: Symbol.M1, BountySymbol: 0, Multiple: 9999, MultipleIndex: 0 },\\n        ], true);\\n    }\\n    //#endregion Event Management\\n\\n    //#region Methods\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置懸賞令資料（以 BaseSymbol multiset 比對前後狀態 — 決定 進場 / 退場 / 退場再進場 / 持續）\\n     *\\n     * 比對規則（內容式，計數 multiset；每個 BaseSymbol 綁定一個 item，持續者保留原綁定）：\\n     * - BC-20 isNewRound=true（新一局）→ 現有全部退場、新清單全部進場（整批重建）\\n     * - BC-21 同局・新增 BaseSymbol（計數增加）→ 進場（SetData + active + PlayIn）\\n     * - BC-22 同局・移除 BaseSymbol（計數減少）→ 退場（PlayOut → active=false）\\n     * - BC-23 同局・同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 變 → 原 item 退場再進場（PlayOut → SetData → PlayIn）\\n     * - BC-24 同局・同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 同・盤面(扣除被消除位置)已無此符號 → 原 item 退場再進場\\n     * - BC-25 同局・同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 同・盤面仍可見 → 持續，不播動畫\\n     * 位置重排一律交由 cc.Layout（本元件只處理 In/Out 動畫，不碰節點位置）。\\n     *\\n     * @param dataList 本輪懸賞令資料（Multiple>0 才顯示）\\n     * @param isNewRound 是否新一局（強制整批重建）；省略視為同局 cascade\\n     * @param visibleBaseSymbols 盤面(扣除被消除位置)目前可見的 BaseSymbol；僅 cascade 需傳，省略視為全可見\\n     */\\n    private SetWantedPosterData(dataList: IBountyData[], isNewRound: boolean = false, visibleBaseSymbols?: number[]) {\\n        if (!this.m_wantedPosterItems || this.m_wantedPosterItems.length === 0) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] SetWantedPosterData: 懸賞令物品未設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.EnsureCurrentBountySize();\\n\\n        const count = this.m_wantedPosterItems.length;\\n        // 本輪要顯示的 bounty（Multiple>0），超量截斷至 item 數量上限\\n        const newBounties = dataList.filter(d => d && d.Multiple > 0);\\n        if (newBounties.length > count) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] SetWantedPosterData: 資料數量超過物品數量',\\n                newBounties.length, '>', count);\\n            newBounties.length = count;\\n        }\\n\\n        if (isNewRound) {\\n            this.RebuildAll(newBounties);\\n        } else {\\n            this.ReconcileCascade(newBounties, visibleBaseSymbols);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch BC-1 整批重建（新一局）：現有全部 Out 並關閉，全部 Out 完成後新清單依序設資料、active、PlayIn。\\n     *     先 Out 再一起 In，避免新舊同時在場造成 Layout 重排跳動。\\n     *     綁定同步記錄為目標狀態（視覺在 Out 完成後才 In）。\\n     */\\n    private RebuildAll(newBounties: IBountyData[]) {\\n        const count = this.m_wantedPosterItems.length;\\n\\n        const outPromises: Promise<void>[] = [];\\n        for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {\\n            const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n            if (item && item.node.active) {\\n                outPromises.push(item.PlayOut().then(() => { item.node.active = false; }));\\n            }\\n            // 同步記錄目標綁定（前 newBounties.length 個為新資料，其餘清空）\\n            this.m_currentBounty[i] = i < newBounties.length ? newBounties[i] : null;\\n        }\\n\\n        const enterAll = () => {\\n            for (let i = 0; i < newBounties.length; i++) {\\n                const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n                if (!item) continue;\\n                item.SetWantedPosterData(newBounties[i]);\\n                item.node.active = true;\\n                item.PlayIn();\\n            }\\n        };\\n\\n        if (outPromises.length > 0) Promise.all(outPromises).then(enterAll);\\n        else enterAll();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 同局 cascade 對帳：以 BaseSymbol multiset 比對目前綁定 ↔ 新清單，保留持續者的 item 綁定。\\n     *     - 同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 同・盤面仍可見 → 持續（不動）         [BC-6]\\n     *     - 同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 變 或 盤面已無此符號 → 原 item 退場再進場 [BC-4/BC-5]\\n     *     - 多出的新 BaseSymbol → 進場（優先用原本就空的 item；不足才等退場者騰出版位）[BC-2]\\n     *     - 少掉的舊 BaseSymbol → 退場                                  [BC-3]\\n     * @param visibleBaseSymbols 盤面(扣除被消除位置)可見的 BaseSymbol；省略視為全可見\\n     */\\n    private ReconcileCascade(newBounties: IBountyData[], visibleBaseSymbols?: number[]) {\\n        const count = this.m_wantedPosterItems.length;\\n        const visible = visibleBaseSymbols ? new Set(visibleBaseSymbols) : null;\\n\\n        // 新清單依 BaseSymbol 分組成可消耗的 pool（multiset）\\n        const pool = new Map<number, IBountyData[]>();\\n        for (const b of newBounties) {\\n            const list = pool.get(b.BaseSymbol);\\n            if (list) list.push(b); else pool.set(b.BaseSymbol, [b]);\\n        }\\n\\n        const preFreeSlots: number[] = [];      // 更新前就空著的 item，供進場立即使用\\n        const vacatingSlots: number[] = [];     // 本輪退場騰出的 item，Out 完才可用\\n        const outPromises: Promise<void>[] = [];\\n        const deferredEnter: IBountyData[] = [];\\n\\n        // Pass A：逐一決定目前已綁定 item 的命運\\n        for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {\\n            const cur = this.m_currentBounty[i];\\n            const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n            if (cur === null) {\\n                if (item) preFreeSlots.push(i);\\n                continue;\\n            }\\n            const bs = cur.BaseSymbol;\\n            const list = pool.get(bs);\\n            if (list && list.length > 0) {\\n                const onBoard = visible ? visible.has(bs) : SetWantedPosterData: 資料數量超過物品數量',\\n                newBounties.length, '>', count);\\n            newBounties.length = count;\\n        }\\n\\n        if (isNewRound) {\\n            this.RebuildAll(newBounties);\\n        } else {\\n            this.ReconcileCascade(newBounties, visibleBaseSymbols);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch BC-1 整批重建（新一局）：現有全部 Out 並關閉，全部 Out count = this.m_wantedPosterItems.length;\\n\\n        const outPromises: Promise<void>[] = [];\\n        for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {\\n            const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n            if (item && item.node.active) {\\n                outPromises.push(item.PlayOut().then(() => { item.node.active = false; }));\\n            }\\n            // 同步記錄目標綁定（前 newBounties.length 個為新資料，其餘清空）\\n            this.m_currentBounty[i] = i < newBounties.length ? newBounties[i] : null;\\n        }\\n\\n        const enterAll = () => {\\n            for (let i = 0; i < newBounties.length; i++) {\\n                const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n                if (!item) continue;\\n                item.SetWantedPosterData(newBounties[i]);\\n                item.node.active = true;\\n                item.PlayIn();\\n            }\\n        };\\n\\n        if (outPromises.length > 0) Promise.all(outPromises).then(enterAll);\\n        else enterAll();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 同局 cascade 對帳：以 BaseSymbol multiset 比對目前綁定 ↔ 新清單，保留持續者的 item 綁定。\\n     *     - 同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 同・盤面仍可見 → 持續（不動）         [BC-6]\\n     *     - 同 nb);\\n                }\\n            });\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 在指定 item 版位進場：設資料、active、PlayIn 並記錄綁定*/\\n    private EnterAt(index: number, data: IBountyData) {\\n        const item = this.m_currentBounty[index] = data;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 確保綁定追蹤陣列長度與 item 數一致（初次/變動時補 null、保留既有）*/\\n    private EnsureCurrentBountySize() {\\n        const count = result;\\n    }\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置懸賞令 UI 顯示狀態\\n     * @param isShow 是否顯示\\n     */\\n    private SetWantedPosterUIShow(isShow: boolean) {\\n        if (!this.m_rootNode) {\\n @param resolve () => void 播完 Mark 後呼叫（Mark_Idle 已在 spine 上 loop）\\n     */\\n    PLAY_MARK: \\\"WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_PLAY_MARK\\\",\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 對 BaseSymbol 對應的常駐 item 播 Mark_Active 並關閉 懸賞令管理器*/\\n@ccclass('WantedPosterManager')\\nexport class WantedPosterManager extends Component {\\n    //#region Constants\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 需要註冊的事件列表\\n     */\\n    private static readonly ];\\n    //#endregion Constants\\n\\n    //#region Properties\\n    @property({\\n        type: Node,\\n        tooltip: \\\"根節點\\\"\\n    })\\n    private m_rootNode: Node = null;\\n\\n    @property({\\n        type: [WantedPosterItem],\\n        tooltip: \\\"懸賞令物品\\\"\\n    })\\n    private m_wantedPosterItems: WantedPosterItem[] = [];\\n\\n    @property({\\n        type: Layout,\\n        tooltip: \\\"懸賞令排版元件（m_wantedPosterItems 父節點上的 cc.Layout）\\\"\\n    })\\n    private m_layout: Layout = null;\\n\\n    @property({\\n        type: WantedPosterLayoutConfig,\\n        tooltip: BaseSymbol、不記 Multiple，故由 Manager 統一追蹤）\\n     */\\n    private m_currentBounty: (IBountyData | null)[] = [];\\n    //#endregion Variables\\n\\n    //#region Lifecycle\\n    /**@ch 元件載入時調用*/\\n    onLoad() {\\n        this.RegisterEvent();\\n        this.RegisterKeyboardEvents();\\n        this.EnsureCurrentBountySize();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 元件啟動時調用（GameView 已就緒，套用初始方向 Layout）*/\\n    start() {\\n        this.ApplyLayoutByOrientation();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 元件銷毀時調用*/\\n    onDestroy() {\\n        if (!this.m_isInitialized) return;\\n        this.UnregisterEvent();\\n        this.UnregisterKeyboardEvents();\\n        this.m_isInitialized = false;\\n    }\\n    //#endregion Lifecycle\\n\\n    //#region Event Management\\n    /**@ch 註冊鍵盤事件（測試用）*/\\n    private RegisterEvent() {\\n        WantedPosterManager.EVENTS_TO_REGISTER.forEach(eventName => {\\n            eventManager.Register(eventName, this);\\n        });\\n        this.m_isInitialized = true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 取消註冊事件*/\\n    private UnregisterEvent() {\\n        WantedPosterManager.EVENTS_TO_REGISTER.forEach(eventName => {\\n            eventManager.UnRegister(eventName, this);\\n        });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 驗證 SET_WANTED_POSTER_UI_SHOW 事件參數\\n     * @param args 事件參數\\n     * @returns 是否有效\\n     */\\n    private ValidateSetWantedPosterUIShowArgs(args: any[]): boolean {\\n        if (typeof args[0] !== 'boolean') {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] SET_WANTED_POSTER_UI_SHOW: 無效的參數', args[0]);\\n            return false;\\n        }\\n        return true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 驗證 SET_WANTED_POSTER_DATA 事件參數\\n     * @param args 事件參數\\n     * @returns 是否有效\\n     */\\n    private ValidateSetWantedPosterDataArgs(args: any[]): boolean {\\n        if (!Array.isArray(args[0])) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] SET_WANTED_POSTER_DATA: 無效的資料參數', args[0]);\\n            return false;\\n        }\\n        return true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 事件回調\\n     * @param event 事件名稱\\n     * @param args 事件參數\\n     */\\n    OnEvent(event: string, ...args: any[]) {\\n        switch (event) {\\n            case WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.SET_WANTED_POSTER_DATA:\\n                if (this.ValidateSetWantedPosterDataArgs(args)) {\\n                    this.SetWantedPosterData(\\n                        args[0] as IBountyData[],\\n                        args[1] === true,\\n                        Array.isArray(args[2]) ? args[2] as number[] : undefined\\n                    );\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.SET_WANTED_POSTER_UI_SHOW:\\n                if (this.ValidateSetWantedPosterUIShowArgs(args)) {\\n                    this.SetWantedPosterUIShow(args[0] as boolean);\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.PLAY_MARK:\\n                this.HandlePlayMark(args[0] as number, args[1] as () => void);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE:\\n                this.HandlePlayMarkActive(args[0] as number, args[1] as () => void);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.GAME_INTRO_COMPLETE:\\n                this.HandleGameIntroComplete();\\n                break;\\n\\n            case GAME_EVENT.DEVICE_ROTATION:\\n                this.ApplyLayoutByOrientation();\\n                break;\\n\\n            default:\\n                warn('[WantedPosterManager] OnEvent: 未知的事件', event);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依目前裝置方向套用對應的 Layout 設定\\n     * 由 start() 與 GAME_EVENT.DEVICE_ROTATION 事件觸發\\n     */\\n    private ApplyLayoutByOrientation(): void {\\n        if (!this.m_layout) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] ApplyLayoutByOrientation: m_layout 未設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const isLandscape = Common.GetGameView().IsLandscape;\\n        const cfg = isLandscape ? this.m_landscapeConfig : this.m_portraitConfig;\\n\\n        this.m_layout.type = cfg.type;\\n        this.m_layout.resizeMode = cfg.resizeMode;\\n        this.m_layout.paddingLeft = cfg.paddingLeft;\\n        this.m_layout.paddingRight = cfg.paddingRight;\\n        this.m_layout.paddingTop = cfg.paddingTop;\\n        this.m_layout.paddingBottom = cfg.paddingBottom;\\n        this.m_layout.spacingX = cfg.spacingX;\\n        this.m_layout.spacingY = cfg.spacingY;\\n        this.m_layout.alignHorizontal = cfg.alignHorizontal;\\n        this.m_layout.alignVertical = cfg.alignVertical;\\n        this.m_layout.updateLayout();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理 PLAY_MARK 事件\\n     * BC-4：對該 BaseSymbol 的所有相符常駐 item 同時播 Mark，全部完成才 resolve\\n     *       （找到 N 個就播 N 個；N=0 才視為 EH-1，0<N 屬可接受降級不 warn）\\n     * EH-1：找不到任何對應 item（空陣列）→ warn + 立刻 resolve（不阻斷上游流程）\\n     * EH-9：resolve callback 缺失 → error（caller bug）\\n     */\\n    private HandlePlayMark(baseSymbol: number, resolve: () => void) {\\n        if (typeof resolve !== 'function') {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] PLAY_MARK: resolve callback 缺失');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const items = this.GetItemsByBaseSymbol(baseSymbol);\\n        if (items.length === 0) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] PLAY_MARK: 找不到對應 item, baseSymbol=', baseSymbol);\\n            resolve();\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        Promise.all(items.map(item => item.PlayMark())).then(() => resolve());\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理 PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE 事件\\n     * BC-6：對該 BaseSymbol 的所有相符 item 同時播 Mark_Active 並各自 active=false\\n     * EH-1：找不到任何對應 item（空陣列）→ warn + 立刻 resolve\\n     * EH-9：resolve callback 缺失 → error\\n     */\\n    private HandlePlayMarkActive(baseSymbol: number, resolve: () => void) {\\n        if (typeof resolve !== 'function') {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE: resolve callback 缺失');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const items = this.GetItemsByBaseSymbol(baseSymbol);\\n        if (items.length === 0) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE: 找不到對應 item, baseSymbol=', baseSymbol);\\n            resolve();\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        Promise.all(items.map(item =>\\n            item.PlayMarkActive().then(() => {\\n                item.node.active = false;\\n                // 收尾關閉 item → 同步清除綁定，避免與 m_currentBounty 失同步\\n                const idx = this.m_wantedPosterItems.indexOf(item);\\n                if (idx >= 0) this.m_currentBounty[idx] = null;\\n            })\\n        )).then(() => resolve());\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理 GAME_INTRO_COMPLETE 事件\\n     * 遊戲介紹完成後顯示 1 個懸賞令（M1、倍率 9999）\\n     * 複用 SetWantedPosterData 顯示路徑：isNewRound=true 走 BC-20 整批重建（SetData + active + PlayIn），\\n     * Multiple=9999 ≥ Multiplier_Max → item 內部走 m_x9999Node 顯示分支\\n     */\\n    private HandleGameIntroComplete() {\\n        // 介紹完成屬「全新展示」→ isNewRound=true，整批重建\\n        this.SetWantedPosterData([\\n            { BaseSymbol: Symbol.M1, BountySymbol: 0, Multiple: 9999, MultipleIndex: 0 },\\n        ], true);\\n    }\\n    //#endregion Event Management\\n\\n    //#region Methods\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置懸賞令資料（以 BaseSymbol multiset 比對前後狀態 — 決定 進場 / 退場 / 退場再進場 / 持續）\\n     *\\n     * 比對規則（內容式，計數 multiset；每個 BaseSymbol 綁定一個 item，持續者保留原綁定）：\\n     * - BC-20 isNewRound=true（新一局）→ 現有全部退場、新清單全部進場（整批重建）\\n     * - BC-21 同局・新增 BaseSymbol（計數增加）→ 進場（SetData + active + PlayIn）\\n     * - BC-22 同局・移除 BaseSymbol（計數減少）→ 退場（PlayOut → active=false）\\n     * - BC-23 同局・同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 變 → 原 item 退場再進場（PlayOut → SetData → PlayIn）\\n     * - BC-24 同局・同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 同・盤面(扣除被消除位置)已無此符號 → 原 item 退場再進場\\n     * - BC-25 同局・同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 同・盤面仍可見 → 持續，不播動畫\\n     * 位置重排一律交由 cc.Layout（本元件只處理 In/Out 動畫，不碰節點位置）。\\n     *\\n     * @param dataList 本輪懸賞令資料（Multiple>0 才顯示）\\n     * @param isNewRound 是否新一局（強制整批重建）；省略視為同局 cascade\\n     * @param visibleBaseSymbols 盤面(扣除被消除位置)目前可見的 BaseSymbol；僅 cascade 需傳，省略視為全可見\\n     */\\n    private SetWantedPosterData(dataList: IBountyData[], isNewRound: boolean = false, visibleBaseSymbols?: number[]) {\\n        if (!this.m_wantedPosterItems || this.m_wantedPosterItems.length === 0) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] SetWantedPosterData: 懸賞令物品未設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.EnsureCurrentBountySize();\\n\\n        const count = this.m_wantedPosterItems.length;\\n        // 本輪要顯示的 bounty（Multiple>0），超量截斷至 item 數量上限\\n        const newBounties = dataList.filter(d => d && d.Multiple > 0);\\n        if (newBounties.length > count) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] SetWantedPosterData: 資料數量超過物品數量',\\n                newBounties.length, '>', count);\\n            newBounties.length = count;\\n        }\\n\\n        if (isNewRound) {\\n            this.RebuildAll(newBounties);\\n        } else {\\n            this.ReconcileCascade(newBounties, visibleBaseSymbols);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch BC-20 整批重建（新一局）：現有全部 Out 並關閉，全部 Out 完成後新清單依序設資料、active、PlayIn。\\n     *     先 Out 再一起 In，避免新舊同時在場造成 Layout 重排跳動。\\n     *     綁定同步記錄為目標狀態（視覺在 Out 完成後才 In）。\\n     */\\n    private RebuildAll(newBounties: IBountyData[]) {\\n        const count = this.m_wantedPosterItems.length;\\n\\n        const outPromises: Promise<void>[] = [];\\n        for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {\\n            const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n            if (item && item.node.active) {\\n                outPromises.push(item.PlayOut().then(() => { item.node.active = false; }));\\n            }\\n            // 同步記錄目標綁定（前 newBounties.length 個為新資料，其餘清空）\\n            this.m_currentBounty[i] = i < newBounties.length ? newBounties[i] : null;\\n        }\\n\\n        const enterAll = () => {\\n            for (let i = 0; i < newBounties.length; i++) {\\n                const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n                if (!item) continue;\\n                item.SetWantedPosterData(newBounties[i]);\\n                item.node.active = true;\\n                item.PlayIn();\\n            }\\n        };\\n\\n        if (outPromises.length > 0) Promise.all(outPromises).then(enterAll);\\n        else enterAll();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 同局 cascade 對帳：以 BaseSymbol multiset 比對目前綁定 ↔ 新清單，保留持續者的 item 綁定。\\n     *     - 同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 同・盤面仍可見 → 持續（不動）         [BC-25]\\n     *     - 同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 變 或 盤面已無此符號 → 原 item 退場再進場 [BC-23/BC-24]\\n     *     - 多出的新 BaseSymbol → 進場（優先用原本就空的 item；不足才等退場者騰出版位）[BC-21]\\n     *     - 少掉的舊 BaseSymbol → 退場                                  [BC-22]\\n     * @param visibleBaseSymbols 盤面(扣除被消除位置)可見的 BaseSymbol；省略視為全可見\\n     */\\n    private ReconcileCascade(newBounties: IBountyData[], visibleBaseSymbols?: number[]) {\\n        const count = this.m_wantedPosterItems.length;\\n        const visible = visibleBaseSymbols ? new Set(visibleBaseSymbols) : null;\\n\\n        // 新清單依 BaseSymbol 分組成可消耗的 pool（multiset）\\n        const pool = new Map<number, IBountyData[]>();\\n        for (const b of newBounties) {\\n            const list = pool.get(b.BaseSymbol);\\n            if (list) list.push(b); else pool.set(b.BaseSymbol, [b]);\\n        }\\n\\n        const preFreeSlots: number[] = [];      // 更新前就空著的 item，供進場立即使用\\n        const vacatingSlots: number[] = [];     // 本輪退場騰出的 item，Out 完才可用\\n        const outPromises: Promise<void>[] = [];\\n        const deferredEnter: IBountyData[] = [];\\n\\n        // Pass A：逐一決定目前已綁定 item 的命運\\n        for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {\\n            const cur = this.m_currentBounty[i];\\n            const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n            if (cur === null) {\\n                if (item) preFreeSlots.push(i);\\n                continue;\\n            }\\n            const bs = cur.BaseSymbol;\\n            const list = pool.get(bs);\\n            if (list && list.length > 0) {\\n                const onBoard = visible ? visible.has(bs) : true;\\n                // 優先配對「相同 Multiple」以持續（不播動畫）；盤面不可見則一律退場再進場\\n                const sameIdx = onBoard ? list.findIndex(b => b.Multiple === cur.Multiple) : -1;\\n                if (sameIdx >= 0) {\\n                    list.splice(sameIdx, 1);                 // BC-6 持續：消耗一筆，item 不動\\n                } else {\\n                    const nb = list.shift()!;                // BC-4/BC-5 退場再進場\\n                    if (item) item.PlayOut().then(() => { item.SetWantedPosterData(nb); item.PlayIn(); });\\n                    this.m_currentBounty[i] = nb;\\n                }\\n                if (list.length === 0) pool.delete(bs);\\n            } else {\\n                // BC-3 新清單已無此 BaseSymbol → 退場\\n                if (item) outPromises.push(item.PlayOut().then(() => { item.node.active = false; }));\\n                this.m_currentBounty[i] = null;\\n                vacatingSlots.push(i);\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        // Pass B：pool 剩餘 = 需進場的新 BaseSymbol [BC-2]\\n        const remaining: IBountyData[] = [];\\n        for (const list of pool.values()) remaining.push(...list);\\n        for (const nb of remaining) {\\n            if (preFreeSlots.length > 0) {\\n                this.EnterAt(preFreeSlots.shift()!, nb);     // 有現成空位 → 立即進場\\n            } else {\\n                deferredEnter.push(nb);                      // 無現成空位 → 等退場者騰出\\n            }\\n        }\\n\\n        // 不足的進場等所有退場完成後，使用騰出的 item 版位\\n        if (deferredEnter.length > 0) {\\n            Promise.all(outPromises).then(() => {\\n                for (const nb of deferredEnter) {\\n                    const idx = vacatingSlots.shift();\\n                    if (idx === undefined) break;            // 理論上不會（已截斷至 count）\\n                    this.EnterAt(idx, nb);\\n                }\\n            });\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 在指定 item 版位進場：設資料、active、PlayIn 並記錄綁定*/\\n    private EnterAt(index: number, data: IBountyData) {\\n        const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[index];\\n        if (!item) return;\\n        item.SetWantedPosterData(data);\\n        item.node.active = true;\\n        item.PlayIn();\\n        this.m_currentBounty[index] = data;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**@ch 確保綁定追蹤陣列長度與 item 數一致（初次/變動時補 null、保留既有）*/\\n    private EnsureCurrentBountySize() {\\n        const count = this.m_wantedPosterItems.length;\\n        if (this.m_currentBounty.length === count) return;\\n        const next: (IBountyData | null)[] = new Array(count).fill(null);\\n        const keep = Math.min(this.m_currentBounty.length, count);\\n        for (let i = 0; i < keep; i++) next[i] = this.m_currentBounty[i];\\n        this.m_currentBounty = next;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依 BaseSymbol 取得**所有**相符的 active 常駐 item（內部用，PLAY_MARK / PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE 路徑）\\n     * 同一盤面允許多筆同 BaseSymbol bounty（各自設到不同 index 的 item），故回陣列而非單一\\n     */\\n    private GetItemsByBaseSymbol(baseSymbol: number): WantedPosterItem[] {\\n        if (baseSymbol === null || baseSymbol === undefined) return [];\\n        const result: WantedPosterItem[] = [];\\n        for (const item of this.m_wantedPosterItems) {\\n            if (item && item.node.active && item.GetBaseSymbol() === baseSymbol) {\\n                result.push(item);\\n            }\\n        }\\n        return result;\\n    }\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置懸賞令 UI 顯示狀態\\n     * @param isShow 是否顯示\\n     */\\n    private SetWantedPosterUIShow(isShow: boolean) {\\n        if (!this.m_rootNode) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] SetWantedPosterUIShow: 根節點未設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.m_rootNode.active = isShow;\\n    }\\n    //#endregion Methods\\n\\n    //#region 測試功能\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 測試按鍵處理\\n     * - 數字鍵 1：顯示 1 個懸賞令\\n     * - 數字鍵 2：顯示 2 個懸賞令\\n     * - 數字鍵 3：顯示 UI\\n     * - 數字鍵 4：隱藏 UI\\n     */\\n    private CheckTestKeyCode(event: EventKeyboard): void {\\n        if (!DEBUG) return;\\n        switch (event.keyCode) {\\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_1:\\n                log('[WantedPosterManager] 測試：顯示 1 個懸賞令');\\n                this.SetWantedPosterData([\\n                    { BaseSymbol: Symbol.M1, BountySymbol: 0, Multiple: 2, MultipleIndex: 0 },\\n                ], true);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case KeyCode.DIGIT_2:\\n                log('[WantedPosterManager] 測試：顯示 2 個懸賞令');\\n                this.SetWantedPosterData([\\n                    { BaseSymbol: Symbol.M4, BountySymbol: 0, Multiple: 256, MultipleIndex: 0 },\\n                    { BaseSymbol: Symbol.M8, BountySymbol: 0, Multiple: 9999, MultipleIndex: 1 },\\n                ], true);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case });\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 驗證 SET_WANTED_POSTER_UI_SHOW 事件參數\\n     * @param args 事件參數\\n     * @returns 是否有效\\n     */\\n    private ValidateSetWantedPosterUIShowArgs(args: any[]): boolean {\\n        if (typeof args[0] !== 'boolean') {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] SET_WANTED_POSTER_UI_SHOW: 無效的參數', args[0]);\\n            return false;\\n        }\\n        return true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 驗證 SET_WANTED_POSTER_DATA 事件參數\\n     * @param args 事件參數\\n     * @returns 是否有效\\n     */\\n    private ValidateSetWantedPosterDataArgs(args: any[]): boolean {\\n        if (!Array.isArray(args[0])) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] SET_WANTED_POSTER_DATA: 無效的資料參數', args[0]);\\n            return false;\\n        }\\n        return true;\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 事件回調\\n     * @param event 事件名稱\\n     * @param args 事件參數\\n     */\\n    OnEvent(event: string, ...args: any[]) {\\n        switch (event) {\\n            case WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.SET_WANTED_POSTER_DATA:\\n                if (this.ValidateSetWantedPosterDataArgs(args)) {\\n                    this.SetWantedPosterData(\\n                        args[0] as IBountyData[],\\n                        args[1] === true,\\n                        Array.isArray(args[2]) ? args[2] as number[] : undefined\\n                    );\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.SET_WANTED_POSTER_UI_SHOW:\\n                if (this.ValidateSetWantedPosterUIShowArgs(args)) {\\n                    this.SetWantedPosterUIShow(args[0] as boolean);\\n                }\\n                break;\\n\\n            case WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.PLAY_MARK:\\n                this.HandlePlayMark(args[0] as number, args[1] as () => void);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE:\\n                this.HandlePlayMarkActive(args[0] as number, args[1] as () => void);\\n                break;\\n\\n            case WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.GAME_INTRO_COMPLETE:\\n                this.HandleGameIntroComplete();\\n                break;\\n\\n            case GAME_EVENT.DEVICE_ROTATION:\\n                this.ApplyLayoutByOrientation();\\n                break;\\n\\n            default:\\n                warn('[WantedPosterManager] OnEvent: 未知的事件', event);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 依目前裝置方向套用對應的 Layout 設定\\n     * 由 start() 與 GAME_EVENT.DEVICE_ROTATION 事件觸發\\n     */\\n    private ApplyLayoutByOrientation(): void {\\n        if (!this.m_layout) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] ApplyLayoutByOrientation: m_layout 未設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const isLandscape = Common.GetGameView().IsLandscape;\\n        const cfg = isLandscape ? this.m_landscapeConfig : this.m_portraitConfig;\\n\\n        this.m_layout.type = cfg.type;\\n        this.m_layout.resizeMode = this.m_layout.paddingBottom = cfg.paddingBottom;\\n        this.m_layout.spacingX = cfg.spacingX;\\n        this.m_layout.spacingY = cfg.spacingY;\\n        this.m_layout.alignHorizontal = cfg.alignHorizontal;\\n        this.m_layout.alignVertical = cfg.alignVertical;\\n        this.m_layout.updateLayout();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理 PLAY_MARK 事件\\n     * BC-4：對該 BaseSymbol 的所有相符常駐 item 同時播 Mark，全部完成才 resolve\\n     *       （找到 N 個就播 N 個；N=0 才視為 EH-1，0<N 屬可接受降級不 warn）\\n     * EH-1：找不到任何對應 item（空陣列）→ warn + 立刻 resolve（不阻斷上游流程）\\n     * EH-9：resolve callback 缺失 → error（caller bug）\\n     */\\n    private HandlePlayMark(baseSymbol: number, resolve: () => void) {\\n        if (typeof resolve !== 'function') {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] PLAY_MARK: resolve callback 缺失');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const items = this.GetItemsByBaseSymbol(baseSymbol);\\n        if (items.length === 0) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] PLAY_MARK: 找不到對應 item, baseSymbol=', baseSymbol);\\n            resolve();\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        Promise.all(items.map(item => item.PlayMark())).then(() => resolve());\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理 PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE 事件\\n     * BC-6：對該 BaseSymbol 的所有相符 item 同時播 Mark_Active 並各自 active=false\\n     * EH-1：找不到任何對應 item（空陣列）→ warn + 立刻 resolve\\n     * EH-9：resolve callback 缺失 → error\\n     */\\n    private HandlePlayMarkActive(baseSymbol: number, resolve: () => void) {\\n        if (typeof resolve !== 'function') {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE: resolve callback 缺失');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        const items = this.GetItemsByBaseSymbol(baseSymbol);\\n        if (items.length === 0) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] PLAY_MARK_ACTIVE: 找不到對應 item, baseSymbol=', baseSymbol);\\n            resolve();\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        Promise.all(items.map(item =>\\n            item.PlayMarkActive().then(() => {\\n                item.node.active = false;\\n                // 收尾關閉 item → 同步清除綁定，避免與 m_currentBounty 失同步\\n                const idx = this.m_wantedPosterItems.indexOf(item);\\n                if (idx >= 0) this.m_currentBounty[idx] = null;\\n            })\\n        )).then(() => resolve());\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 處理 GAME_INTRO_COMPLETE 事件\\n     * 遊戲介紹完成後顯示 1 個懸賞令（M1、倍率 9999）\\n     * 複用 SetWantedPosterData 顯示路徑：isNewRound=true 走 BC-20 整批重建（SetData + active + PlayIn），\\n     * Multiple=9999 ≥ Multiplier_Max → item 內部走 m_x9999Node 顯示分支\\n     */\\n    private HandleGameIntroComplete() {\\n        // 介紹完成屬「全新展示」→ isNewRound=true，整批重建\\n        this.SetWantedPosterData([\\n            { BaseSymbol: Symbol.M1, BountySymbol: 0, Multiple: 9999, MultipleIndex: 0 },\\n        ], true);\\n    }\\n    //#endregion Event Management\\n\\n    //#region Methods\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 設置懸賞令資料（以 BaseSymbol multiset 比對前後狀態 — 決定 進場 / 退場 / 退場再進場 / 持續）\\n     *\\n     * 比對規則（內容式，計數 multiset；每個 BaseSymbol 綁定一個 item，持續者保留原綁定）：\\n     * - BC-20 isNewRound=true（新一局）→ 現有全部退場、新清單全部進場（整批重建）\\n     * - BC-21 同局・新增 BaseSymbol（計數增加）→ 進場（SetData + active + PlayIn）\\n     * - BC-22 同局・移除 BaseSymbol（計數減少）→ 退場（PlayOut → active=false）\\n     * - BC-23 同局・同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 變 → 原 item 退場再進場（PlayOut → SetData → PlayIn）\\n     * - BC-24 同局・同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 同・盤面(扣除被消除位置)已無此符號 → 原 item 退場再進場\\n     * - BC-25 同局・同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 同・盤面仍可見 → 持續，不播動畫\\n     * 位置重排一律交由 cc.Layout（本元件只處理 In/Out 動畫，不碰節點位置）。\\n     *\\n     * @param dataList 本輪懸賞令資料（Multiple>0 才顯示）\\n     * @param isNewRound 是否新一局（強制整批重建）；省略視為同局 cascade\\n     * @param visibleBaseSymbols 盤面(扣除被消除位置)目前可見的 BaseSymbol；僅 cascade 需傳，省略視為全可見\\n     */\\n    private SetWantedPosterData(dataList: IBountyData[], isNewRound: boolean = false, visibleBaseSymbols?: number[]) {\\n        if (!this.m_wantedPosterItems || this.m_wantedPosterItems.length === 0) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] SetWantedPosterData: 懸賞令物品未設置');\\n            return;\\n        }\\n        this.EnsureCurrentBountySize();\\n\\n        const count = this.m_wantedPosterItems.length;\\n        // 本輪要顯示的 bounty（Multiple>0），超量截斷至 item 數量上限\\n        const newBounties = dataList.filter(d => d && d.Multiple > 0);\\n        if (newBounties.length > count) {\\n            warn('[WantedPosterManager] SetWantedPosterData: 資料數量超過物品數量',\\n                newBounties.length, '>', count);\\n            newBounties.length = count;\\n        }\\n\\n        if (isNewRound) {\\n            this.RebuildAll(newBounties);\\n        } else {\\n            this.ReconcileCascade(newBounties, visibleBaseSymbols);\\n        }\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch BC-20 整批重建（新一局）：現有全部 Out 並關閉，全部 Out 完成後新清單依序設資料、active、PlayIn。\\n     *     先 Out 再一起 In，避免新舊同時在場造成 Layout 重排跳動。\\n     *     綁定同步記錄為目標狀態（視覺在 Out 完成後才 In）。\\n     */\\n    private RebuildAll(newBounties: IBountyData[]) {\\n        const count = this.m_wantedPosterItems.length;\\n\\n        const outPromises: Promise<void>[] = [];\\n        for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {\\n            const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n            if (item && item.node.active) {\\n                outPromises.push(item.PlayOut().then(() => { item.node.active = false; }));\\n            }\\n            // 同步記錄目標綁定（前 newBounties.length 個為新資料，其餘清空）\\n            this.m_currentBounty[i] = i < newBounties.length ? newBounties[i] : null;\\n        }\\n\\n        const enterAll = () => {\\n            for (let i = 0; i < newBounties.length; i++) {\\n                const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n                if (!item) continue;\\n                item.SetWantedPosterData(newBounties[i]);\\n                item.node.active = true;\\n                item.PlayIn();\\n            }\\n        };\\n\\n        if (outPromises.length > 0) Promise.all(outPromises).then(enterAll);\\n        else enterAll();\\n    }\\n\\n    /**\\n     * @ch 同局 cascade 對帳：以 BaseSymbol multiset 比對目前綁定 ↔ 新清單，保留持續者的 item 綁定。\\n     *     - 同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 同・盤面仍可見 → 持續（不動）         [BC-25]\\n     *     - 同 BaseSymbol・Multiple 變 或 盤面已無此符號 → 原 item 退場再進場 [BC-23/BC-24]\\n     *     - 多出的新 BaseSymbol → 進場（優先用原本就空的 item；不足才等退場者騰出版位）[BC-21]\\n     *     - 少掉的舊 BaseSymbol → 退場                                  [BC-22]\\n     * @param visibleBaseSymbols 盤面(扣除被消除位置)可見的 BaseSymbol；省略視為全可見\\n     */\\n    private ReconcileCascade(newBounties: IBountyData[], visibleBaseSymbols?: number[]) {\\n        const count = this.m_wantedPosterItems.length;\\n        const visible = visibleBaseSymbols ? new Set(visibleBaseSymbols) : null;\\n\\n        // 新清單依 BaseSymbol 分組成可消耗的 pool（multiset）\\n        const pool = new Map<number, IBountyData[]>();\\n        for (const b of newBounties) {\\n            const list = pool.get(b.BaseSymbol);\\n            if (list) list.push(b); else pool.set(b.BaseSymbol, [b]);\\n        }\\n\\n        const preFreeSlots: number[] = [];      // 更新前就空著的 item，供進場立即使用\\n        const vacatingSlots: number[] = [];     // 本輪退場騰出的 item，Out 完才可用\\n        const outPromises: Promise<void>[] = [];\\n        const deferredEnter: IBountyData[] = [];\\n\\n        // Pass A：逐一決定目前已綁定 item 的命運\\n        for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {\\n            const cur = this.m_currentBounty[i];\\n            const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n            if (cur === null) {\\n                if (item) preFreeSlots.push(i);\\n                continue;\\n            }\\n            const bs = cur.BaseSymbol;\\n            const list = pool.get(bs);\\n            if (list && list.length > 0) {\\n                const onBoard = visible ? visible.has(bs) : true;\\n                // 優先配對「相同 Multiple」以持續（不播動畫）；盤面不可見則一律退場再進場\\n                const sameIdx = onBoard ? list.findIndex(b => b.Multiple === cur.Multiple) : -1;\\n                if (sameIdx >= 0) {\\n                    list.splice(sameIdx, 1);                 // BC-25 持續：消耗一筆，item 不動\\n                } else {\\n                    const nb = list.shift()!;                // BC-23/BC-24 退場再進場\\n                    if (item) item.PlayOut().then(() => { item.SetWantedPosterData(nb); item.PlayIn(); });\\n                    this.m_currentBounty[i] = nb;\\n                }\\n                if (list.length === 0) pool.delete(bs);\\n            } else {\\n                // BC-3 新清單已無此 BaseSymbol message.content:
This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   The user requested a refactoring of the SetWantedPosterData specification for a wanted poster system in a Cocos Creator slot game. The core requirements were:
   - If BaseSymbol is different from the current one, the wanted poster must exit immediately
   - If BaseSymbol is the same, the wanted poster must exit when the next RoundInfo occurs OR when that BaseSymbol is no longer visible on the board
   - Simplify positioning by delegating movement to cc.Layout, with wanted posters only handling their own entry/exit animations

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - BaseSymbol multiset reconciliation with count-based comparison
   - Event-driven architecture using eventManager.Dispatch
   - Promise-based animation sequencing (PlayIn/PlayOut)
   - Cocos Creator framework (cc.Layout, cc.Node, Component lifecycle)
   - TypeScript with strict type checking
   - Protocol buffer definitions (ar2pq9Proto)
   - Cascade operations in slot game mechanics
   - State management across game rounds
   - Disconnect reconnection (unshow) handling

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - **assets/Script/WantedPoster/WantedPosterManager.ts** (Core refactoring)
     - Added m_currentBounty tracking array to maintain IBountyData bindings
     - Refactored SetWantedPosterData signature:
       ```typescript
       private SetWantedPosterData(dataList: IBountyData[], isNewRound: boolean = false, visibleBaseSymbols?: number[])
       ```
     - Implemented RebuildAll method for BC-20 (new round full rebuild)
     - Implemented ReconcileCascade method with two-pass algorithm:
       - Pass A: Match existing bindings against new data using BaseSymbol multiset pool
       - Pass B: Handle remaining new BaseSymbols using free or vacated slots
     - Added EnterAt helper method for item entry with binding tracking
     - Added EnsureCurrentBountySize to maintain array size consistency
     - Updated HandlePlayMarkActive to clear m_currentBounty on item close
     - Business cases renumbered from BC-1/2/3/4/5/6 to BC-20/21/22/23/24/25

   - **assets/Script/GameView.ts** (Caller updates)
     - Updated SetNowRoundInfo to pass isNewRound=true:
       ```typescript
       eventManager.Dispatch(WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.SET_WANTED_POSTER_DATA, plateInfo?.BountyDataVec || [], true);
       ```
     - Updated OnCommand info case to clear posters with isNewRound=true during connection initialization

   - **assets/Script/GameState/UnshowPrepareState.ts** (Disconnect reconnection)
     - Updated free game restoration path (line 103) to pass isNewRound=true
     - Updated main game restoration path (line 122) to pass isNewRound=true
     - Both paths treat disconnection recovery as full rebuild scenario

   - **assets/Script/GameState/MatchingPatchUpState.ts** (Cascade operations)
     - Added protocol import for ar2pq9Proto types
     - Updated SET_WANTED_POSTER_DATA dispatch to pass isNewRound=false and visibleBaseSymbols:
       ```typescript
       const visibleBaseSymbols = this.ComputeVisibleBaseSymbols(plateInfo);
       eventManager.Dispatch(WANTED_POSTER_MANAGER_EVENT.SET_WANTED_POSTER_DATA, bountyDataVec, false, visibleBaseSymbols);
       ```
     - Implemented ComputeVisibleBaseSymbols method:
       - Builds Set of eliminated positions using GetColRowFromPosition
       - Iterates PlateSymbol grid excluding eliminated positions
       - Returns unique BaseSymbols as array using Set deduplication

4. Errors and fixes:
   - No errors were encountered during implementation
   - TypeScript typecheck showed 60+ errors but all were pre-existing framework errors in Cocos Creator engine declarations and Astarte framework type definitions
   - Zero errors found in any modified game code files (confirmed via grep filter)

5. Problem Solving:
   - **Initial complexity concern**: Original specification included manual position calculation with tweening to handle smooth movement, which would conflict with cc.Layout
   - **Solution**: User simplified by delegating all positioning to cc.Layout, reducing implementation scope significantly
   - **Multiset reconciliation algorithm**: Implemented two-pass approach to handle BaseSymbol binding continuity while supporting enter/exit/persist scenarios
   - **Type safety**: All new method signatures, parameter types, and protocol imports validated successfully through TypeScript compilation

6. All user messages:
   - "SetWantedPosterData的規格需要再修改 1.BaseSymbol不一樣的話就要退場 2.BaseSymbol一樣的話，當下一個RoundInfo時就一定要退場或是盤面上沒有該BaseSymobl了 請先了解需求，若有問題請先提出來，勿先修改"
   - "剛才的移動就交給cc.Layout處理，懸賞令就只處理本身的動畫就好"

7. Pending Tasks:
   - None explicitly stated; implementation appears complete

8. Current Work:
   The most recent work involved renumbering the business case identifiers from BC-1 through BC-6 to BC-20 through BC-25 throughout the SetWantedPosterData specification documentation. This was done in the main SetWantedPosterData method comment block and in the HandleGameIntroComplete comment. The implementation is complete with:
   - All core logic refactored in WantedPosterManager
   - All caller sites updated (GameView, UnshowPrepareState, MatchingPatchUpState)
   - ComputeVisibleBaseSymbols implemented for cascade scenarios
   - TypeScript type checking passed with zero errors in modified files
   - All six business cases (BC-20 through BC-25) documented and implemented

9. Optional Next Step:
   No next step required. The refactoring is complete and type-safe. The renumbering to BC-20 through BC-25 has been applied consistently across the specification. The implementation is ready for runtime testing and validation.

If you need specific details from before compaction (like exact code snippets, error messages, or content you generated), read the full transcript at: C:\Users\jiunchiwang\.claude\projects\C--Users-jiunchiwang--claude-mem-observer-sessions\ccf2f7f4-3f1f-42a8-abc2-12b23087a9c8.jsonl
Continue the conversation from where it left off without asking the user any further questions. Resume directly — do not acknowledge the summary, do not recap what was happening, do not preface with "I'll continue" or similar. Pick up the last task as if the break never happened.

{\\n            for (let i = 0; i < newBounties.length; i++) {\\n                const item = this.m_wantedPosterItems[i];\\n                if (!item) continue;\\n                item.SetWantedPosterData(newBounties[i]);\\n                item.node.active = true;\\n                item.PlayIn();\\n            }\\n        };\\n\\n        if (outPromises.length > 0) ReconcileCascade(newBounties: IBountyData[], visibleBaseSymbols?: number[]) {\\n        const count = this.m_wantedPosterItems.length;\\n        const visible = visibleBaseSymbols ? new Set(visibleBaseSymbols) : null;\\n\\n        // 新清單依 BaseSymbol 分組成可消耗的 pool（multiset）\\n        const pool = new Map<number, IBountyData[]>();\\n        for (const b of newBounties) {\\n            const list = pool.get(b.BaseSymbol);\\n            if (list) list.push(b); else pool.set(b.BaseSymbol, [b]);\\n        }\\n\\n        const preFreeSlots: number[] = [];      // 更新前就空著的 item，供進場立即使用\\n        const vacatingSlots: number[] = [];     // 本輪退場騰出的 item，Out 完才可用\\n        const outPromises: Promise<void>[] = [];\\n        const deferredEnter: IBountyData[] = [];\\n\\n        // Pass (list && list.length > 0) {\\n                const onBoard = visible ? visible.has(bs) : true;\\n                // 優先配對「相同 Multiple」以持續（不播動畫）；盤面不可見則一律退場再進場\\n                const sameIdx = onBoard } else {\\n                    const nb = list.shift()!;                // BC-4/BC-5 退場再進場\\n                    if (item) item.PlayOut().then(() => { item.SetWantedPosterData(nb); item.PlayIn(); ];\\n    //#endregion Constants\\n\\n    //#region Properties\\n    @property({\\n        type: Node,\\n        tooltip: \\\"根節點\\\"\\n    })\\n    private m_rootNode: Node = null;\\n\\n this.UnregisterKeyboardEvents();\\n        this.m_isInitialized = false;\\n    }\\n    //#endregion Lifecycle\\n\\n    //#region Event Management\\n    /**@ch 註冊鍵盤事件（測試用）*/\\n    private
